subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath ordained for His servant such tribulations as He hath destined for none among all the worlds, whereby He decreed for Us that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی قدر لعبده من البلایا ما لا قدر لاحد من العالمین بحیث قضی علینا ما
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
